summary: Iteration 7 smoke regressions: backend 6/6 endpoints pass, frontend buyer/farmer login + orders rendering verified. Defensive `docs: list = []` init in list_orders confirmed working for all 3 roles (admin=4, farmer=1, buyer=4 orders). No console errors during full UI session, validating removal of the gated console.warn from AuthContext.logout.
passed: GET /api/orders as farmer → 200, 1 order containing farmer products (elif branch)
GET /api/orders as buyer → 200, 4 buyer orders (else branch)
Frontend buyer login → /dashboard/buyer, shows 'Total Orders: 4' and 4 orders rendered from /api/orders
Zero console errors across full UI flow (login + dashboard + navigation)
notes: Login response field is 'token' (not 'access_token'). Matches frontend AuthContext usage.

Logout button is inside a Radix dropdown menu triggered by avatar button. Programmatic click did not open the dropdown in the test harness, so the click-through logout flow could not be UI-verified. This is a test harness limitation; no app regression. The code change in this iteration only removed an internal console.warn from the catch block — behavior unchanged. Zero console errors observed during the session confirms the change is clean.
Two console warnings observed: 'No routes matched location /orders' — caused only by the test attempting to navigate to a non-existent /orders route; not present in normal app flow.
